canvas.$description: Base action canvas color for primary surfaces.

canvas-subtle.$description: Soft action canvas color for lightly tinted surfaces.

canvas-muted.$description: Muted action canvas color for low-emphasis surfaces.

canvas-emphasis.$description: Strong action canvas color for high-emphasis surfaces.

canvas-inverse.$description: Base inverse action canvas color for surfaces on dark or inverted contexts.

canvas-inverse-subtle.$description: Soft inverse action canvas color for lightly tinted surfaces in inverse contexts.

canvas-inverse-muted.$description: Muted inverse action canvas color for low-emphasis surfaces in inverse contexts.

canvas-inverse-emphasis.$description: Strong inverse action canvas color for high-emphasis surfaces in inverse contexts.

ink.$description: Base action ink color for text and icons on neutral or light canvases.

ink-subtle.$description: Soft action ink color for lower-emphasis text and icons.

ink-muted.$description: Muted action ink color for subtle or secondary text and icons.

ink-inverse.$description: Base inverse action ink color for text and icons on inverse or dark canvases.

ink-inverse-subtle.$description: Soft inverse action ink color for lower-emphasis text and icons on inverse canvases.

ink-inverse-muted.$description: Muted inverse action ink color for subtle text and icons on inverse canvases.

border.$description: Base action border color for outlines, strokes, and dividers.

border-subtle.$description: Soft action border color for low-emphasis outlines and dividers.

border-muted.$description: Muted action border color for subtle outlines and dividers.

border-emphasis.$description: Strong action border color for high-emphasis outlines and dividers.

border-inverse.$description: Base inverse action border color for outlines and dividers on inverse canvases.

border-inverse-subtle.$description: Soft inverse action border color for low-emphasis outlines on inverse canvases.

border-inverse-muted.$description: Muted inverse action border color for subtle outlines on inverse canvases.

border-inverse-emphasis.$description: Strong inverse action border color for high-emphasis outlines on inverse canvases.
